about: I'm a 2nd year B.Tech student at VIT Vellore who likes working close to the metal. Most of my projects live somewhere between hardware and software: writing Linux device drivers, getting YOLOv8 to run in real time on a Raspberry Pi, or designing my own telemetry protocol over raw TCP sockets. I care about making things work on constrained hardware, and I debug with dmesg and Wireshark more than with print statements.
education: Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT), Vellore. B.Tech, Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering (2024 to 2028)
headline: Electronics & Instrumentation Engineer
tagline: Embedded Systems · Computer Vision · Linux Internals
